summary: Phase 2 Scoring Engine & Data Transparency features fully verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed covering scoring engine APIs, transparent score breakdowns, and data transparency fields. Frontend: All features working - Discover page shows Live/confidence badges on product cards, Product Detail page shows complete Launch Score Breakdown with 5 components (Trend, Margin, Competition, Ad Activity, Supplier) each with score, weight, contribution, and reasoning text.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with launch_score field
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with all 5 component scores (trend_score, margin_score, competition_score, ad_activity_score, supplier_demand_score)
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with data_sources array
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with confidence_score (0-100)
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with last_updated timestamp
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with launch_score_breakdown object
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/launch-score-breakdown endpoint exists and returns data
Backend: launch-score-breakdown has components array with 5 score components
Backend: launch-score-breakdown has formula with description and calculation breakdown
Backend: launch-score-breakdown has score_reasoning with component explanations
Backend: launch-score-breakdown has data_transparency section (data_sources, confidence_score, last_updated)
Backend: Reasoning strings describe WHY scores are what they are
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/google-trends requires API key
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/google-trends endpoint works with valid API key
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scores/recompute requires API key
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scores/recompute successfully recomputes scores
Backend: Unavailable data marked clearly (not fabricated values)
Frontend: Discover page shows 'Live' badges on product cards
Frontend: Discover page shows confidence badges (e.g., '100% conf.')
Frontend: Product cards display Launch Score prominently with label (Promising/Strong Launch/etc)
Frontend: Product Detail page has 'Launch Score Breakdown' section
Frontend: Score breakdown shows all 5 components with scores/weights/contributions
Frontend: Score breakdown shows formula (30% Trend + 25% Margin + 20% Competition + 15% Ad + 10% Supplier)
Frontend: Each component has reasoning text explaining WHY the score is what it is
Frontend: Data transparency footer shows Sources, Confidence %, Updated timestamp
Frontend: 'Live Data' badge visible in data transparency section
Frontend: Unavailable data shows clear messages like 'Ad activity data unavailable'
critical_code_review_comments: ScoringEngine implementation is clean with proper separation of concerns - calculate_all_scores returns comprehensive breakdown
Scoring formula weights correctly implemented: trend=0.30, margin=0.25, competition=0.20, ad_activity=0.15, supplier_demand=0.10
Each score calculation method returns (score, reasoning) tuple for transparency
launch_score_breakdown endpoint provides excellent data for UI: components with name/raw_score/weight/contribution/explanation
Data transparency properly tracked with data_sources, confidence_score, last_updated, is_real_data fields
Google Trends scraper uses pytrends library with proper rate limiting (2 second delay)
Frontend ProductDetailPage.jsx correctly renders all score components with reasoning text

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all scoring engine & data transparency features verified)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing scraped product data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scoring engine and data transparency features fully tested and working. Key endpoints: GET /api/products/{id}/launch-score-breakdown returns detailed score breakdown with components, formula, reasoning. POST /api/ingestion/scrape/google-trends enriches products with Google Trends velocity data. POST /api/ingestion/scores/recompute recomputes all scores using ScoringEngine. Frontend correctly displays Launch Score Breakdown card with 5 components (Trend, Margin, Competition, Ad Activity, Supplier) each showing score/weight/contribution/reasoning. Data transparency footer shows Sources, Confidence %, Updated timestamp, and Live Data badge.
